node_7.subject: Wolfgang Schulz
node_7.description: This is Wolfgang Schulz's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, go for a run at the park from 8:15 am to 9:00 am, have breakfast at 9:15 am, attend classes and study sessions from 10:00 am to 3:00 pm with scheduled breaks, have lunch with classmates at 12:30 pm, meet with a study group from 3:30 pm to 5:00 pm, review study materials and finish assignments from 5:00 pm to 6:00 pm, eat dinner at 6:00 pm.
